name: Soup Noodles with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup steamed chicken breast, cooled & shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the hard tips off the soaked lily flowers and cut them in half.
2. Wash the noodles, then boil until tender (about 2 minutes). Drain and place in bowls.
3. Heat the broth in a saucepan with salt and sugar.
4. Add vinegar just before adding broth to the bowls.
5. Add oil to a hot wok. When it begins to smoke, add onions and stir-fry until fragrant.
6. Add vegetables; stir-fry for 1 minute.
7. Put the mixture onto noodles.
8. Top with chicken.
9. Add soup and serve.
